## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] CI / build / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] Conventional Commits format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `ruff check .` clean
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` clean
- [ ] `mypy --strict src/price_tracker tests` clean
- [ ] `pytest` all green; coverage on touched files >= 80%
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `[Unreleased]` (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing change
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks ran locally (no secrets committed)
